notes: Tightens Other Uses routing so field-identification, look-alike, comparison, warning, and emergency/survival-only text does not create false Other Use entries.
Keeps true Other Uses for real non-food practical uses such as tinder, dye, fiber, pitch/resin, craft/material, drawing/scouring, and similar utility uses.

Hides false Other Uses text from detail pages unless the record has a real practical other-use signal; affected records remain visible through their existing normal routes such as Caution, ID/comparison, food, medicinal, or search.
Adds short explanatory text to the Other Uses and Needs Review pages to clarify that Other Uses means real practical uses and Needs Review is a work queue, not a species type.
No species records, edible statuses, toxicity statuses, medicinal action fields, map features, or image fields changed.
